title: Atm
description: In accordance with the Defence Infrastructure Panel - Major Construction, SON4138417, the following five panellists have been selected to tender for construction works as the Managing Contractor for the Defence Mulwala/Benalla Facility Redevelopment Project: a. Acciona Construction Australia Pty Ltd b. Built Pty Limited c. CPB Contractors Pty Limited d. Icon SI (AUST) Pty Ltd; and e. Seymour Whyte Constructions Pty Ltd The RFT process is expected to commence in late Q2 2026 and further information will be provided to the shortlisted panellists at a later stage.
